body: Babe you up yet? 😄 Zaria is asking again if she can come in Wednesday after school to help with the smothered chicken prep. She made me promise to ask you today.
I'm up now lol. Tell her yeah, long as she's done with homework first. Wednesday's light before the dinner rush, I can put her to work for real.
She is gonna be SO excited. Also Jaylen said practice ends at 5:30 — can you swing by and get him on your way in so I don't have to make two trips?
That works. I'll leave here by 5, grab him, drop him home then head to the kitchen. Tell Zaria bring an apron — I ain't playing around.
Found some beautiful whole catfish at Southside Market this morning. Thinking about a cornmeal-crusted special for Friday night. You off Thursday? Need a taste-tester I trust.
I'm off Thursday, I'm there. Does Mama know yet or is she finding out with everybody else 😂
Your mama always knows. She already texted me asking if she needs to bring her coleslaw.
Lol naturally. I'll be there by 6.

Zaria they had fresh gulf shrimp at Southside this morning, big as my thumb. Got me thinking about a shrimp and grits weekend special. You coming by Saturday to taste test before I put it on the board?
Daddy YES😭 you already know I'm there. What time? I'll bring Caleb too if you want more opinions lol
Tell Caleb noon, before the lunch rush hits. And ask your mama if she wants to come — I want to get it right before I commit to the menu board.
She's already texting me back saying yes 😂 she said "tell him not to be stingy with the cheese sauce this time"
Caleb you free Thursday evening? Got a new catfish po'boy I'm testing before it hits the Soul Kitchen menu. Need real feedback, not polite feedback.
lol you know I never give polite feedback. What time?
Six o'clock. Tell your brother too if Jaylen's not on shift. Your mama's already in — she just don't know it yet. 😄
haha I'll tell him. we got you dad
You got Jaylen working the line this summer or he still think he too good for dish duty 😄 been wondering when my grandson gonna learn what a real kitchen takes.
Dishes first two weeks. Told him what you told me — you don't earn the stove til you respect the floor. He rolled his eyes but showed up Monday on time, so we'll see.
That's right. Bring him by the house one Sunday, I'll show him how to season a cast iron proper. Some things you gotta learn hands-on, can't Google it.
Yes sir. We'll come after church. He needs to hear it from you anyway — carries more weight when it don't come from his daddy. 😌

Mama, found a whole bushel of fresh butter beans at Southside this morning. Been thinking about putting your smothered version on the Soul Kitchen menu. How long did you cook those down with the salt pork?
Baby, two hours minimum — low and slow. Don't you dare rush 'em. And it's salt pork not fatback, that's what gives it that color. You know this.
Yes ma'am. Caleb was helping me prep yesterday and I caught him rushing the roux. Don't know where these children get that from 😄
Mm. Didn't get it from my side. Tell that boy to be still with his hands. Good cooking don't hurry for nobody — not even a Friday rush.
Aye did Jaylen really work the line last night?? Monique sent me a video of him plating ribs looking all serious 😂 boy think he a chef now
Man he did. Stayed till close too. I wasn't gonna say nothing but he's got the touch — don't tell him that yet tho, head already big enough.
That's your blood right there. You putting him on the real schedule or nah?
Talking to him Saturday. If he's serious I'll have him on prep through July. Time to find out if he wants this or just likes the idea of it.
Tanya you see Caleb yesterday? Boy showed up to the Kitchen at 6am talkin bout he want to learn the biscuit recipe. Had him rolling dough two hours straight 😄
Wait he actually stayed?? Last time you put him on dish duty he disappeared after 20 minutes 😂
Stayed the whole morning. Asked real questions too, not just goofing. Monique says don't read too much into it but I don't know — something felt different.
That boy got your blood in him Darius. Memphis Soul Kitchen might just stay in the family for real. 🙏
Chef you already hit Southside this mornin? Julio's asking if we still runnin the fried catfish special Thursday or if you switched it out for the smoked brisket board again
Got 40 lbs of catfish, good price today. Tell Julio both — brisket board stays, catfish special runs Thursday thru Saturday. I'll be back by 11, start thawing the collards.
Copy that. Also Monique stopped by and dropped off a tray of her skillet cornbread for the crew 😄 kitchen smells incredible rn
Ha. That's all her. Don't let it disappear before I walk in — save me two pieces, I'm serious Devon.
Hey Chef — catfish count from Southside looks short, we got 18 lbs but the ticket says 24. You still have your receipt from this morning's run?
Yeah I got it. That's on them, not us. Set aside what came in for Friday's special and I'll call Ray over there before 3.
Got it. Also Jaylen stopped by looking for you, said he'd swing back around dinner service.
He knows where to find me. Tell him come early if he wants a plate before the rush hits.
Hey Darius — tenant in 2B called again, says the exhaust fan above Soul Kitchen's been rattling since Tuesday night. Anything going on with the hood system up there?
Yeah I'm already on it. Belt's slipping on the Captive-Aire unit. Got Richmond HVAC coming Thursday morning before we open — should be handled well before the lunch rush.
Ok good. They'll need roof access so I'll drop a key at the management office Wednesday. Don't want that tenant putting anything in writing.
Appreciate it Frank. Jaylen's opening Thursday so he'll meet them and walk them up. We'll get it squared away.

Darius, still counting on Soul Kitchen for the Fourth of July cookout Friday? Congregation's been asking about that brisket since January. Just need to know by tomorrow so we can plan the rest of the spread.
Yes sir, I got you. Heading to Southside Wholesale Tuesday morning anyway so I'll grab the brisket and throw in some ribs too — figure we're feeding close to 80 this year?
Lord willing 🙏 Caleb said he'd come over around noon to help haul tables if that works for you. We're grateful every year, brother.
That works perfect. Tell Caleb he gets first plate before anybody else touches it 😄 See you Friday, Pastor.
Darius, just checking in — you mentioned at your last visit you'd been skipping lunch during the dinner rush Thurs-Sat. Any improvement on that? I know Soul Kitchen gets packed on weekends.
Honest answer? Still stealing bites between tickets. Caleb's been helping more on the line so it's getting better. Had an actual sit-down meal Sunday after church — first time in a while.
That's good to hear. Even 15 minutes seated matters for digestion and stress levels. Try to hold onto that Sunday rhythm — your body needs fuel same as anybody working that hard 😊
Yes ma'am. Monique's been saying the exact same thing. She told me if she hears 'I'll eat after service' one more time she's gonna start bringing plates to the kitchen herself. I'll do better.
Hey Darius! Heads up — Jaylen's Saturday game got moved to 10am instead of noon. Coach Ellis requested the earlier slot. Conflict at all?
Appreciate it Karen. 10am works, I do my Southside market run Saturday mornings but I can push it back after the game. Jaylen's been pumped for this one.
So glad! Also our snack family had to bail last minute 😬 any chance Memphis Soul Kitchen could spare something small for the kids after?
Ha — cornbread's never small around here but I'll bring a tray, don't worry about it. Just shoot me the gym address again and we're good.
Chef you got a sec? The cornbread batter runnin low and we still got the lunch rush comin. Jaylen said you might have more mix in the dry storage but I can't find it.
Back shelf behind the grits, big blue bin — two bags in there. If not, cut portions small til I'm back from Southside. Should be there by 11.
Found it, we good. You grabbing the smoked turkey necks today? We almost out and Tuesday deliveries always come in late.
Already on my list. Grabbing extra this week, got a feeling the weekend's gonna run hot. Hold it down til I get there.
Hey chef, you make it to Southside this morning? Wanted to know if we actually got the fresh catfish before I figure out my station for tonight.
Got there at 6, snagged 40 lbs. Grabbed extra collards too — Earl's stopping by before service. Need you in by 2 to start the fryer batter, don't be late.
2pm no problem. Jaylen working tonight? Could use another set of hands on the line if you're cool with it.
Nah, he's got school tomorrow. It's just us. Full floor — Monique already texted me the res list looks heavy. Be sharp when you walk in.

DeShawn, heading back from Southside in about 40 mins. Need you to check the sanitizer level on the Hobart before I get in — last Tuesday it was reading low right at service and Monique had to run the rack twice.
On it. You want me to run a test strip too or just eyeball the tank?
Run the strip. Picked up two cases of sheet pans at the market, gonna need the rack cleared out by 4 so we got somewhere to stage 'em.
Rack's already clear, got here a little early. Strip's reading good. See you when you pull in.
Darius baby, you went to Southside this morning right? Did they have butter beans? I been wanting to make a pot all week and the Kroger ones just ain't the same.
Yes ma'am, grabbed a bag for the restaurant. Threw in an extra pound for you — Monique can drop it by Wednesday when she picks up Caleb from practice.
Boy you didn't have to do all that! Tell me you got the speckled kind and not those sad little green ones they been pushing lately 😂
Fresh speckled, came off the truck this morning. Wouldn't bring you nothing less, Ms. Gloria. 😄
Darius you good for Thursday rehearsal? Marquise wants us to run the full set before the Dogtown show. Caleb still riding out with you or he got other plans?
Thursday works, just gotta wrap by 8. Got a produce delivery Friday — Southside man comes at 6am and I cannot miss him again like last time.
Lol Caleb texted me saying he wants to sit in on keys at the show. That boy serious.
He been noodling on the keyboard at the restaurant after close all week. Monique said let him so now I got a whole thing on my hands 😄 tell Marquise we'll be there by 6.
Loretta, made Mama's jalapeño cornbread this morning — first time since last summer. Got more than enough over here. Swing by if you want some while it's still warm.
Oh Lord, Darius. You know I cannot say no to that. Give me 10 minutes to put my shoes on 😂
Take your time. Monique made sweet tea too. Jaylen's out front mowing so just come around back when you get here.
That boy is something else. On my way. Thank you honey ❤️
